notes: Listed on Nasdaq and LSE. Three-platform ecosystem (Payments, Marketplace, Fintech) plus consumer travel and merchant services. Dominant super-app in Kazakhstan; expanding into Turkey and CIS.

segments.name: Payments
segments.description: P2P transfers, QR payments, merchant acquiring, bill pay

segments.name: Marketplace
segments.description: Take rate from third-party sellers + Kaspi Travel + Kaspi Shop

segments.name: Fintech (consumer credit)
segments.description: BNPL Kaspi Red, consumer loans, deposits, debit cards

segments.name: B2B / merchant services
segments.description: SME lending, POS terminals, accounting integrations

competitors.name: Halyk Bank
competitors.notes: Largest traditional bank by assets; chasing on app side via Homebank

competitors.name: Forte Bank
competitors.notes: Mid-tier retail / SME bank with growing digital push

competitors.name: Wildberries / Ozon (in marketplace)
competitors.notes: Russian marketplaces with KZ logistics presence

competitors.name: Apple Pay / Google Pay
competitors.notes: Tap-to-pay alternative; gaining merchants but stuck on card rails

prior_transformations.name: Branch-to-app pivot
prior_transformations.description: Closed >70% of physical branches; pushed customers to app
prior_transformations.learnings: Aggressive timeline paid off; courier card delivery key enabler

prior_transformations.name: Marketplace launch (Kaspi Shop)
prior_transformations.description: Added third-party sellers on top of payments; built logistics with Kazpost
prior_transformations.learnings: Payments user base = built-in marketplace demand; merchants onboarded for free

prior_transformations.name: Kaspi Travel
prior_transformations.description: OTA-style domestic and CIS travel inside super-app
prior_transformations.learnings: Gross revenue grew, take-rate margin remained below international OTA benchmarks

prior_transformations.name: Magnum (grocery delivery) JV
prior_transformations.description: Joint logistics for same-day grocery via Magnum supermarket chain
prior_transformations.learnings: Unit economics not yet positive; competing with Glovo/Yandex.Eda

prior_transformations.name: Turkey market entry (Hepsiburada JV)
prior_transformations.description: Acquired stake in Hepsiburada for super-app footprint in Turkey
prior_transformations.learnings: Currency volatility and regulatory uncertainty are early friction

strategic_priorities: Defend KZ super-app dominance vs Halyk and traditional banks
Scale Hepsiburada / Turkey expansion to second core market
Grow B2B / merchant credit segment (currently 5% of revenue)
Maintain ~50% net margin against fintech competition
pain_points: Reliance on Kazakhstan macro (FX, inflation, oil-linked)
Regulatory exposure - one tariff change can hit payments margin
Difficulty differentiating in mature segments (P2P at saturation)
Tech talent retention - large global tech companies competing for engineers
Brand has not yet translated to Turkey; trust must be re-earned
